basic_details.job_title: CSIR SERC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 64 Project Assistant, Project Associate Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Associate-I, Project Associate-II & Project Assistant-II
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-Structural Engineering Research Centre (CSIR-SERC), Chennai has published Notification No. SE-2/2026 dated 08 May 2026 for engagement of Project Associate-I/II and Project Assistant-II on temporary basis. The walk-in interview is scheduled on 21 May 2026. A total of multiple positions are available in various ongoing projects. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech, M.E/M.Tech and relevant experience may apply online through the CSIR-SERC portal on or before 21 May 2026 (up to 10:30 AM). The engagement is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project.

age_limit.details: Upper Age Limit: 35 years as on date of Interview (21.05.2026) | Age Relaxation: | 5 years for SC/ST/Women/PwD 3 years for OBC

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the following eligibility as on the date of interview: | Discipline-wise Minimum Qualification | Project Associate-II: B.E/B.Tech + 2 years experience OR M.E/M.Tech/M.S in relevant discipline (Civil/Mechanical/Structural/Aerospace etc.) Project Associate-I: B.E/B.Tech in Civil/Mechanical/Aerospace Engineering or equivalent Project Assistant-II: 3 years Diploma in Civil/Mechanical/Architecture/Electronics/Electrical/Instrumentation Engineering | Desirable Qualifications: GATE Score, First Class in qualifying degree, experience in structural analysis software (ANSYS, STAAD, ABAQUS, ETABS, SAP2000), MATLAB, experimental techniques etc. (as per project requirement).

vacancy_details.Project Title: Smart Village – Assessment of wind loads... (MMP045201)
Smart Village – Assessment of wind loads... (MMP045201)
Vibration Qualification Tests of MHG System (SSP 444)

selection_process: Walk-in Interview on 21.05.2026 Candidates must register online on or before 21.05.2026 (10:30 AM) Shortlisting may be done based on qualifications
experience and marks if number of applicants is large Final selection based on performance in interview
how_to_apply: Fill the online application/registration form through the Online Recruitment Portal on CSIR-SERC website www.serc.res.in
Upload all relevant documents (educational certificates, experience, DOB, category etc.)
No hard copy of application should be sent
Report for Walk-in Interview on 21.05.2026 at 09:00 AM with all original documents and self-attested copies
important_instructions: Engagement is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Maximum tenure in CSIR as Project Staff is 6 years. Final year students awaiting results are not eligible. No Travelling Allowance will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidature. Candidates must bring duly signed online application along with all original documents for verification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CSIR-SERC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online registration for CSIR-SERC Recruitment 2026 is 21 May 2026 up to 10:30 AM. Candidates interested in Project Associate-I, Project Associate-II, and Project Assistant-II positions must complete the online application process before the deadline through the official CSIR-SERC portal.

faq.question: Q2. Which posts are available under CSIR-SERC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: CSIR-Structural Engineering Research Centre (CSIR-SERC), Chennai has announced recruitment for Project Associate-I, Project Associate-II, and Project Assistant-II posts. These positions are available across multiple ongoing research and engineering projects under temporary and contractual engagement basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the selection process for CSIR-SERC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists mainly of a Walk-in Interview scheduled on 21 May 2026. Candidates may also be shortlisted based on academic qualifications, marks, and relevant experience if the number of applications received is high. Final selection will depend on interview performance and document verification.

faq.question: Q4. What educational qualifications are required for CSIR-SERC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for Project Associate posts should possess B.E/B.Tech, M.E/M.Tech, or equivalent qualifications in relevant disciplines such as Civil, Mechanical, Aerospace, or Structural Engineering. For Project Assistant-II posts, applicants should have a 3-year Diploma in relevant engineering disciplines from recognized institutions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for CSIR-SERC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for all posts is 35 years as on the date of interview, which is 21 May 2026. Age relaxation benefits are available for SC, ST, OBC, Women, and PwD candidates according to Government of India and CSIR recruitment rules

faq.question: Q6. What salary is offered under CSIR-SERC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for Project Associate-II posts may receive up to ₹35,000 plus HRA, while Project Associate-I posts offer up to ₹31,000 plus HRA depending on qualification and GATE score. Emoluments vary according to project and position, and some posts may offer lower fixed remuneration based on eligibility conditions.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for CSIR-SERC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official CSIR-SERC recruitment notification. Eligible candidates can complete the online registration process without paying any application charges for the advertised project positions.

faq.question: Q8. How can candidates apply for CSIR-SERC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must fill the online registration form available on the official CSIR-SERC website and upload required educational, category, and experience documents. No hard copy of the application needs to be sent. Applicants must also attend the walk-in interview with original certificates and self-attested copies for verification
